title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXLIX. Charms.
content:
Swan swam over the sea - 
            Swim, swan, swim;
        Swan swam back again,
            Well swam swan,
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXLIX. Charms."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
